{{Expand}}

{{Infobox concept
| name = Malice's ideal Path
| introduced = cradle-12-waybound
}}

== Waybound ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[The Book of Eternal Night]] was meant to contain [[Malice]]’s ideal [[Path]].<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c25">''Waybound'', chapter 25</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Concepts]]
[[Category:Waybound]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle concepts]]
[[Category:Literature]]
